uiKeyParity.note: Heuristic from merged `public/i18n/{locale}.json` key counts vs `en.json`. Does not measure semantic translation quality.

missingTranslations: Use `npm run i18n:validate` and marketing CSV reports under `tools/i18n/reports/` for per-locale gaps; educational overlays are partial (fr/es/tl sample present). Run `npm run i18n:global-progress` to refresh `data/audit/translation-progress-global.json`.
examMappingCompleteness: Authoritative entries in `data/config/global-locale-matrix.json` — not yet wired to all UI surfaces.
seoReadiness: PARTIAL — canonical + sitemaps exist; full hreflang matrix pending incremental implementation.
paywallIntegrity: SERVER_ENFORCED — revalidate when new localized learner routes ship.

successCriteriaProgress.fullSiteTranslatableViaOverlays: IN_PROGRESS — pattern established; coverage grows per locale batch
successCriteriaProgress.noEnglishLeakage: POLICY_EXISTS — enforce via i18n:validate + missing-key policy
